title: Megaforce Of Undying
description: Simple texture that transforms your totem of undying into a can of the European energy drink Megaforce! Or as Finnish person would say "Megis".
body:
### Megaforce is a staple of Finnish internet culture so I thought it would be funny to make this small and to be honest, low effort totem texture. 
Megaforce is a dutch energy drink that's sold in northern Europe but mostly distrtibuted by the SOK-group in Finland. It's a cheap drink that mostly comes in 500ml cans and 3 flavours. I hope Megaforce can help you survive in Minecraft! :D
